description_long: This is a modern, single-story house surrounded by dense, mature trees and landscaped greenery, creating a secluded and private atmosphere. The house features a flat roof and a geometric layout with multiple interconnected rectangular sections, some of which appear to be open courtyards or patios. The exterior is composed of a mix of light-colored walls, wooden accents, and large glass panels, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. A swimming pool is visible in the backyard, adjacent to a spacious terrace area with outdoor seating. The property is bordered by a hedge and a driveway, providing access and privacy. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding natural environment.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass panels, and wooden accents, surrounded by dense trees and featuring a backyard pool and terrace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and dense tree coverage framing the house.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard pool, terrace, and open patio areas, with trees forming a natural barrier.
description_view_2: Side view revealing the geometric layout, multiple sections, and a mix of open and enclosed spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the flat roof, light-colored walls, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, minimal steps, and no porch, framed by landscaping and a driveway.
